LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PENDING LITIGATION. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT ORDERED CONSOLIDATION OF THIS ACTION WITH CGC-20-587352 (LEAD CASE) ON MARCH 2, 2021. THAT ORDER ALSO STAYED THE REMAINDER OF THE CONSOLIDATED ACTION WHILE ARBITRATION BETWEEN SWINERTON AND TRM CORPORATION PROCEEDS. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Pending Litigation
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SWINERTON BUILDERS' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Pending Litigation.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. The Court ordered consolidation of this action with CGC-20-587352 (lead case) on March 2, 2021. That order also stayed the remainder of the consolidated action while arbitration between Swinerton and TRM Corporation proceeds.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
